violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the bathrooms were lacking proper hand-washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Baby formula was observed with an expired date mark of (6/1/2025). PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Inspector observed shelf of beverages stored against mop sink in the back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -milk coolers -back storage shelves New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Inspector observed outside refuse enclosure in poor repair (broken gate). New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of litter and other debris around the refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The floors in the back storage area and under retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The wall behind mop sink is constructed of drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

The floors in the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
